checklist.detail: Primary viewer navigation and main reachable; tablist announced
Live Feed Connecting status + skeleton without layout jump
Search error alert plain language; Retry keyboard-focusable
OS reduce motion: spinner/tab transitions not distractingly animated
Help (?) opens shortcut table; Escape returns focus to Help
Escape clears Search filter fields; focus stays in filter
Theme toggle, Help, search filters, Retry announced by accessible name

notes: Sample fixture only — replace buildId/gitSha/host when recording a real pass.
Does not prove Authenticode or platform signing; see packaging ADR 0003.
